title: telis anguina
intro: Telis anguina, also known as wormseed or Chenopodium anthelminticum, is a plant species that has been used for its medicinal properties to treat various health issues. The plant is known for its anthelmintic properties, which help to expel intestinal worms and other parasites from the body. It is also valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Telis anguina can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote digestive health and reduce inflammation.
